Experiment Tracking

MLflow records every metric, loss, and checkpoint for every training run. Start the UI in a separate terminal:

mlflow ui --backend-store-uri sqlite:///mlflow.db Open MLflow UI →

Start Training

Run training in a terminal from the project root:

python train.py --config debug   # fast CPU test
python train.py --config dev     # standard run
python train.py --config dev --resume  # resume latest
